steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank completes a noun phrase about specific fertilizers. The modifier must be restrictive (specifying which fertilizers) rather than nonrestrictive (adding extra detail about already-identified ones), because the study focuses on fertilizers that contain particular macronutrients.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — sentence fragment option: placing ‘Containing macronutrients’ after a period creates a fragment with no main clause. ✗
  • Choice B — comma + participial phrase: the comma makes the modifier nonrestrictive, implying all fertilizers are already identified — too broad. ✗
  • Choice C — 'fertilizers containing': no comma, so the participial phrase is restrictive and specifies exactly which fertilizers the study examines. ✓
  • Choice D — comma + alternate phrasing: like B, the comma creates a nonrestrictive modifier that loses the necessary specificity. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
